programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: Emily brings her mother along with her to Walnut, and Darrell wastes no time finding an advantage. Kenny gets some advice from a music legend, while Shana and Edwina settle for thrifting what's in front of them.

programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: While in Texas, the guys find two once-in-a-lifetime automotive picking opportunities before meeting another collector with a meteorite and branding irons, and afterwards, a sprawling junkyard has an owner who is reluctant to sell.

programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.desc: Take your best shot with the Pawn Stars when Rick frames up a signed print of Ansel Adams' famous photograph.

programs.desc: A look ahead at tonight's AFL game.
